sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ الْمُدِيرُ رِيمَ عَنْ سَيْرِ الْمَشْرُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je pitao Rim o napretku projekta.
sentences.translationEn: The manager asked Reem about the progress of the project.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّ الْعَمَلَ يَسِيرُ بِشَكْلٍ جَيِّدٍ.
sentences.translation: Rekla je da posao napreduje dobro.
sentences.translationEn: She said that the work is going well.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَتْهُ أَنَّهَا سَتُنْهِيهِ قَبْلَ نِهَايَةِ الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Rekla mu je da će ga završiti prije kraja sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: She told him she will finish it before the end of the week.

sentences.translation: Direktor je rekao «odlično» i nasmiješio joj se.
sentences.translationEn: The manager said «excellent» and smiled at her.
